audit_items.proof_trace: The only malloc/free pair in the file is in memtest_alloc_and_test(): m is allocated (L338), fully used via memtest_test() (L345), and freed (L346) as the final statement before return — no subsequent use of m exists. No global or static pointer stores a copy of m, and no function invoked after free() references it. The double-free property holds trivially: exactly one free(m) call exists in the entire file.
